Free Counselling

Cyber WarriorsDigital Safety Program

Join our mission to create a cyber-safe India. Free awareness sessions for individuals, educational institutions, and organizations.

500+
Sessions Conducted
10,000+
People Trained
50+
Partner Institutions
100%
Free of Cost

Register for Session

100% Free | No Charges

This is a free initiative by ETI Educom

What You'll Learn

Comprehensive cybersecurity awareness covering the most critical threats

Threat Awareness

Learn to identify phishing, scams, and social engineering attacks before they strike.

Digital Safety

Protect your personal data, finances, and digital identity with proven strategies.

Community Shield

Empower your community to create a collective defense against cyber threats.

Scam Detection

Master the art of recognizing fake calls, UPI fraud, and online deception.

Topics Covered

Our sessions cover practical, real-world cybersecurity topics that help participants protect themselves and their organizations from digital threats.

Phishing & Email Scams
Social Media Safety
UPI & Banking Fraud Prevention
Password Security & 2FA
Safe Online Shopping
Fake Call Detection
Data Privacy Basics
Mobile Security

Who Can Attend?

Individuals

Personal cybersecurity awareness

Schools & Colleges

Student safety workshops

Organizations

Corporate cyber awareness

Government Bodies

Public sector training

Test Your Cyber Knowledge

Take our free 10-question assessment and earn your Cyber Warrior Certificate! Score 7 or more to prove your cybersecurity awareness.

Take Free Assessment

Organize a Session at Your Institution

Want to bring Cyber Warriors to your school, college, or organization? Contact us to schedule a free awareness session.
